name: razzmatazz-monorepo
description: Razzmatazz monorepo: pure TypeScript core runtime and React adapter

scripts.build: bun run --filter @razzmatazz/core build && bun run --filter @razzmatazz/react build
scripts.test: bun run build && bun run --filter @razzmatazz/core test && bun run --filter @razzmatazz/react test
